items.title: Former US general got drunk in Kyiv, suffered concussion, left classified maps on train, watchdog finds

items.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
items.dek: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
items.body: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.

items.title: Poch made exception for 'special talent' Reyna
items.dek: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino said that Gio Reyna is a "very special talent," which is why he was willing to look past the player's lack of playing
items.body: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino said that Gio Reyna is a "very special talent," which is why he was willing to look past the player's lack of playing time at club level and name him to the USMNT roster for a pair of upcoming friendlies.
items.author: IriLine Desk
